stable.notes:
### Added
- **Portal-locked (trial) licenses.** A license can now carry an optional
  `portal_ids` claim; `scan` and `probe` verify the connected portal against it
  (via the already-probed `/account-info/2026-03/details` endpoint, recorded in
  the trace like every call) and fail closed on a mismatch. Paid licenses omit
  the claim and stay unrestricted. `tools/issue_license.py issue` gains a
  repeatable `--portal-id` flag, the ledger records the lock, and `list` shows
  it. This makes the partner trial safe to offer: a trial key covers the
  partner's own portal plus the client portal(s) they pick, instead of their
  entire client base.
